PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Feb-10-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
April Peng and Nicolas Henry Hite, petitioners in pro per.

The matter was called for hearing on Petition to Establish Fact of Marriage.

The Court stated it had reviewed the provided materials and received the proposed order from the petitioners. The Court granted the petition and signed the order in open court.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
